stemHtml: On a typical EFIS system, the failure of a VHF navigation (VOR) receiver will result in which of the following indications?

options.a: The pointer rotates around the display and a VOR 1 or 2 failure warning bar appears.
options.b: The associated magenta deviation bar and/or pointer is removed from the display.
options.c: The deviation bar and/or pointer change colour to red and flash intermittently.
options.d: The pointer flashes and a VOR 1 or 2 failure warning bar appears.
